svg.text: Print at 100% / Actual Size · Temporary board: place → calibrate → remove
Overlap 15 mm · Stick sheets ON TOP at dashed attach lines · Crosses = exact corners
PLACE THIS EDGE ON C1 ATTACH LINE
PLACE THIS EDGE ON C3 ATTACH LINE
PLACE THIS EDGE ON B2 ATTACH LINE
CONTROL + STUMP EDGE — THIS RED LINE MUST MEASURE EXACTLY 160 mm
MIDDLE STUMP TOUCHES THIS RED EDGE
Quiet zone (dashed) is outside · Vision / app measure the 160 mm module square only
Arrow points DOWN THE PITCH · After calibration, remove all 9 sheets
